album.artist: アトラスサウンドチーム
album.title: 『ペルソナ5』オリジナル・サウンドトラック

wiki.summary: “Last Surprise” is the normal battle theme for Persona 5. The song is composed by Shoji Meguro and sung by Lyn Inaizumi. The lyrics are claimed in the credits to be written by “Benjamin Franklin.” The song is about being determined to win fights/battles and knowing you have more power than you think you do. You are able to turn the tables with either words or moves, winning all with no problem. Read more on Last.fm.
